title: verbascum aureum var. joannis
intro: Verbascum aureum var. joannis, also known as Golden Mullein, is a plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and supporting immune function. Golden Mullein can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural relief from respiratory issues.
